users.name: Super Admin
users._comment: Super-admin, no organization. System panel, setup wizard, impersonation.

users.name: Test User
users._comment: Regular user with one personal organization (owner + admin).

users.name: App Admin
users._comment: Global admin (Filament app panel). One personal organization.

users.name: Org Owner
users._comment: Owns Acme and Beta Co (created in seeder). Used for multi-org scenarios.

users.name: Unverified User
users._comment: User with unverified email for testing verification flow.

users.name: Onboarding User
users._comment: User who has not completed onboarding (redirect to onboarding).

users.name: Multi-Org User
users._comment: Personal org + member of Acme as admin. Tests org switcher.

users.name: Member Only
users._comment: No personal org. Member of Acme only (org.members.view, no invite/settings/pages).

users.name: Mixed Roles
users._comment: Personal org (owner) + Acme (admin) + Beta Co (member). Different roles per org.
